description: Schema for extracting structured data from invoices.

issue_date.description: The date when the invoice was issued, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

due_date.description: The date when the invoice payment is due, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vendor.description: Information about the vendor or supplier.

email.description: Email address of the vendor/supplier for billing inquiries.

bill_to.description: Information about the customer being billed.

name.description: Name of the customer/recipient of the invoice.

address.description: Full billing address of the customer.

line_items.description: A list of individual items or services billed.

description.description: Description of the item or service.

quantity.description: Number of units for the item.

unit_price.description: Price per unit of the item.

amount.description: Total amount for the line item (quantity * unit_price).

totals.description: Summary of all financial totals for the invoice.

subtotal.description: Sum of all line item amounts before taxes and discounts.

tax_rate.description: Applicable tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.08875 for 8.875%).

tax_amount.description: Total amount of tax applied to the invoice.

grand_total.description: The final total amount due for the invoice, including taxes.

payment_terms.description: Details regarding payment conditions and instructions.
